texto: Why hadn't he chosen a different Amish barn to bed down in last nacht? He hated Bethany seeing him like this. Remembering him like this. A homeless wanderer. A stray.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laura V. Hilton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Why hadn't he chosen a different Amish barn to bed down in last nacht? He hated Bethany seeing hi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, fiction, chosen pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
